headline: Lennox Reaffirms 2026 Guidance and Announces 2030 Long-Term Targets at 2026 Investor Day
summary: Lennox (NYSE: LII), a leader in energy–efficient climate control solutions, reaffirmed previously issued full-year 2026 financial guidance for revenue, adjusted EPS, capital expenditures, and free cash flow, consistent with assumptions outlined on its 2025 fourth quarter earnings call.
